summary: QA validation after env separation and dependency resolution. Both backend health check and frontend base route verified working in preview environment.
critical_code_review_comments: Environment separation properly configured: .env.dev for Docker dev, .env.prod for production
Backend .env uses localhost MongoDB (mongodb://localhost:27017) for non-Docker preview
Frontend .env correctly points to preview URL (https://blackiefi-v3.preview.emergentagent.com)
docker-compose.yml uses .env.dev with Docker-internal MongoDB URL (mongodb://mongodb:27017)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smoke test passed. /api/health returns ok. Frontend loads login page correctly. Preview environment running non-Docker with supervisor-managed services.

tests_executed.Frontend base route: PASSED - Login page loads with title 'BlackieFi - Premium Finance'
